items.text: Profit Calc buy/sell location dropdowns fixed — options used commodity price as the value, so locations sharing a price (e.g. Rod's Fuel and Megumi both 2,584 aUEC) couldn't be selected. Now use unique index-based values with price/location stored as data attributes.
Added Endgame as an Aluminium sell location (Pyro, 4,000 aUEC) to trade-locs.json.
Added Megumi → Endgame Aluminium route to the Routes tab (Tier 2), credited to CatStache — short low-risk Pyro loop.
Live UEX rebuild buy/sell location cap raised from top 6 to top 12 per commodity — previously cut off lower-ranked-but-still-relevant sell terminals like Endgame for Aluminium (was ranked 11th).

Best Route Calculator reworked — STARTING SYSTEM replaced with separate FROM/TO selectors, each offering Any / per-system / individual station (110 stations across Stanton, Pyro, Nyx), built dynamically from TRADE_LOCS.

Added LOCATION TYPE filter to Best Route Calculator — Any, Stations only (no elevators), Ground outposts only, or Exclude jump gateways. New STATION_TYPES lookup classifies all 110 stations (39 stations, 64 outposts, 7 gateways) from live UEX terminal data.

Exec Hangar Timer resynced to exec.xyxyll.com — new ground-truth epoch 2026-06-13T01:58:00.833Z (cycle 36). Previous CatNipp-derived epoch from 2026-06-10 was no longer accurate after 4.8.1 cycle timing instability. exec-epoch-worker.js rewritten to auto-fetch from Xyxyll instead of the dead Redline source.

Exec Hangar UI redesigned — unified single card replacing the old two-card layout that showed two countdowns side by side with no labels distinguishing them (looked contradictory, e.g. "11:04 before reset" next to "16:04 remaining"). New layout: 5-segment progress bar, single labeled "next light change" countdown, plain-English explainer, and a Closes/Opens timeline.

Game version bumped to 4.8.1 LIVE throughout. Audited all data sources — ship DB, missions, and grind guide already covered all 4.8/4.8.1 content (Starlite, Ironclad/Assault, Hammerhead, MOTH, defend missions, refuelling 2.0).
Added 4.8.1 aUEC transfer cap notice to Org Ops — player-to-player transfers capped at ~999,999 aUEC per transaction, recipient must be online and actively accept. Affects session loot splits.
Fixed Ship DB Full Database tab rendering empty — missing SDB_ROLE_COLORS object (lost during earlier data extraction) caused a silent ReferenceError that broke the entire ship row render loop.
Fixed sdbBuildRoleFilters/sdbUpdateStats/sdbFilterShips running at script-parse time before the DOM existed — moved into DOMContentLoaded.
Fixed Fleet View showing "undefined" for all ships — SHIP_LOADOUTS uses compact key 's.n' for ship name, not 's.name'. Fixed in fvInit, fvAddShip, fvRender.
Reverted SDB_SHIPS and SHIP_LOADOUTS back to inline const arrays — external fetch caused a race condition where the Ship DB rendered before data arrived. Inline data loads instantly with no race.

Mining Compendium Lasers tab fully reworked into 5 sub-tabs: S1 Heads, S2 Heads, Quality System, Modules, Recommended Builds. Full stat comparison tables sourced from SC Wiki, quality system (q0–q1000) referenced from SCMDB Star Miner.
BHG Stack Calc capped at 10 contracts (was 20) — matches the in-game limit of 10 active bounty contracts at once.

Exec Hangar Timer recalibrated to ground truth — epoch confirmed via in-game observation (5 green LEDs at 2026-06-10T06:48:00Z). Removed all external site references. Manual sync UI restored (session-only override, reverts to ground truth on reload).

Roadmap rebuilt — cleared completed/stale items, added 9 new Planned items (salvage panel, hot-ore widget, Quant decay timer, loadout cost calc, loot split calc, recurring session templates, next-BP-unlock lookup, bounty hunter loadout guide, counter-ship lookup) and 19 Considering items.
Version 1.0 release. Full audit pass, version bump, all roadmap items completed.

Data splits complete — 892KB → 615KB HTML. 10 JSON files lazy-loaded from GitHub Pages: missions, comp-bps, curated-loadouts, trade-locs, ship-loadouts, sdb-ships, rep-factions, combat-profiles, matchup-data, changelog.
Service worker added (sw.js) — tool caches all shell files and JSON data on first load. Works offline after initial visit. Cache version matches release version.
PWA manifest added — tool can be installed to home screen on Android and iOS. Standalone display mode, Catfight theme colour.

Exec epoch worker reworked — now auto-fetches calibrated epoch directly from exec.xyxyll.com/app.js on each request. Falls back to hardcoded value if xyxyll unreachable. No manual redeploy needed per patch.

Exec Hangar Timer fully reworked to match exec.xyxyll.com exactly. ONLINE=65min (insert compboards), OFFLINE=120min (wait). Epoch: 2026-06-05T19:47:35.211-04:00. Cycle: 185min 226ms. Old manual sync panel removed.
Worker health dashboard — RTT history graph added. Last 24 response times per worker visualised as SVG bar chart. History persists in localStorage across sessions.
Ship DB — rental prices expanded from ~40 to 220+ ships. Full catalogue covering all rentable ships. New Rentable Only filter in availability dropdown.
Org Ops — session debrief mode. After session, log actual income per player, add notes, rate session 1-5 stars. Shows variance vs estimate. Saves to session history.
Synergy Checker tab added to Combat Analysis — input ship, weapon type, shield, engagement style. Returns loadout strengths, conflicts, tactical notes, and relevant matchup links.
Multi-hop round trip planner added to Trade Routes tab — finds best outbound + return leg combination for a given ship SCU and home system.
Commodity watchlist added to Trade panel — star commodities, set price alert threshold, highlighted with gold border when live UEX price exceeds threshold. Persists in localStorage.
Fleet View import/export — base64 paste code. Share org fleet config in Discord, members paste to import. Duplicate ship+member combos skipped on merge.
Dark/light theme toggle — ☀ LIGHT in footer. Warm parchment light theme. Preference persists in localStorage.
Keyboard shortcuts — press panel key (G/T/R/C/O/S/Y/M/J/B/F/I/E/L/P) to jump directly. Press ? for overlay. Disabled while typing in inputs.

Combat profiles expanded to 21 — RSI Polaris added (corvette-class, 4× S10 torpedo tubes, 210 SCM, surprisingly low IR for a capital, pledge only). Full crew guide (10-crew role breakdown) and stealth approach build.
Matchups expanded to 21 — Fighting the Polaris, Polaris vs Hammerhead, Polaris torpedo doctrine (full 4-tube simultaneous salvo or don't fire).

Starfarer refuelling tier added to Grind Guide — 6 steps covering United Wayfarers rep grind (~42 contracts to Senior), Urgent Fleet Refuel loop (~1.8M/run, 5M+/hr ceiling), loop optimisation, Gemini variant tradeoff, Pyro interdiction risk management.

Fleet View tab added to Ship DB — add org member ships, organises by role category (Fighter/Gunship/Cargo/Mining/Salvage/Support/Interdict/Utility), coverage summary bar highlights gaps. Persists in localStorage.

Shared session state — 🌐 LIVE SESSION bar in Org Ops. Coordinator hits 📡 PUSH to share session config (objective, system, players, roles, ships, duration) via Cloudflare KV worker. Org members hit ⬇ PULL to load. Auto-checks on panel open. 8hr session expiry.
Ping tracker — live latency display in the RSI/AWS status bar. Measures RTT to RSI infrastructure, 3-ping average, colour-coded green/gold/amber/red. Click to retest. Refreshes every 2 minutes.
Keyboard shortcuts — press any panel key (G/T/R/C/O/S/Y/M/J/B/F/I/E/L/P) to jump directly. Press ? for the shortcut overlay. Disabled while typing in inputs. ? SHORTCUTS link in the footer.

MOTD ticker — hidden bar between status bar and nav. CatMilker edits motd-worker.js (active, type, title, message, expires) and redeploys to push org announcements without an HTML update. Types: info/warning/patch/event.

Trade route calculator — top of Routes tab. Input ship SCU, starting system, risk tolerance. Calculates profit per trip for all UEX commodities, sorted by best total haul value. Live investment required shown.
PvP Tier List tab added to Combat Analysis — S/A/B/C/D tiers for solo and multi-crew/fleet. 20 ships rated with reasoning. Updated per patch.
Refinery Queue Estimator added to Mining Compendium refinery tab — ore type, SCU, method, submit time → duration, completion time, yield SCU, estimated aUEC value from live UEX.
Changelog category filter — filter by tag (GRIND/COMBAT/SHIPS/LOADOUTS/ORG/INTERDICT/EXEC/INFRA/MINING/BUILDER/DATA). Entry count shown.
Matchups expanded 15 → 17. Added Ares Ion escort meta, Perseus fleet engagement (attack vectors + torpedo timing), Hammerhead crew coordination (blind spot exploitation, undermanned vulnerability).
Meteor confirmed in-game purchasable at ~4.31M aUEC. Updated from pledge-only — price corrected, pledge weakness removed from profile.

Ship price audit — Arrow, Gladius, Shiv, Scorpius, Vulture, Zeus CL, Hermes, C2 and 20 other hardcoded prices updated or replaced with live SC Wiki data spans. Prices raised significantly across the board in 4.8.
Curated loadouts JSON — all 24 hardcoded aUEC prices replaced with "check Ship DB" to avoid stale figures after CIG price changes.

Exec Hangar Timer — new panel. Live 185min 699ms cycle counter, 5 LED indicators (red/green/off), countdown to next LED change, next green window, 12hr schedule. Manual sync (tap when LED changes in-game to recalibrate to ±1s). CZ self-timers: Keycard Printer (30min), Vault Door (20min), Terminal/Compboard (15min), Crypt Door (20min), Custom. All persist in localStorage.

Grind Guide — Interdiction income tier added. 6 steps: solo light intercept → PAF bounty farming → duo JP ambush → full org JP op → drug run escort → CFP enforcement. Live Quant/Neon/E'tam/WiDoW prices inline.

Grind Guide — Multi-crew tier added. 6 steps: MOLE 3-crew, Redeemer 4-crew ERT, Starlancer TAC fleet anchor, Hammerhead 6-crew patrol, Perseus anti-capital, Reclaimer crew salvage. Per-player income estimates with live Quant pricing.
Org Ops + Interdict Planner — save/load named sessions. Up to 8 named saves each, stored in localStorage. Load restores full config including crew roster, roles, ships, location.

Org Ops — session timer. Duration dropdown (no timer → 4hr), live countdown HH:MM:SS, progress bar (teal → amber → red), end time display, start/pause/reset controls. Timer injected into mission brief.
Curated loadouts — search/filter bar. Search by name/role/manufacturer/playstyle. Filter by role, size, crew. Live count display. Clear button.
Ship Compare — radar/spider chart. SVG overlay of two ships on 6 axes: SCM, Shield HP, DPS, Pitch, QD Range, Stealth. Ship A teal, Ship B lava.
Roadmap panel added — upcoming features tracked in-tool, updated each session.
Changelog panel added — full version history from v0.1 to current, in-tool.

File split — missions.json (198KB), comp-bps.json (53KB), curated-loadouts.json (57KB) moved to separate GitHub files. HTML: 1MB → 709KB. Cloudflare worker CORS bug fixed (duplicate Access-Control-Allow-Origin header was blocking all live data).
Heavy fighter tier header updated to include F8C Lightning, Hurricane, Guardian MX.
Cargo tier header updated to include Zeus Mk II CL and RSI Hermes.
Red Wind Linehaul added to cargo tier — Breton/Durango/Genoa power plant BPs, 100% drop, run passively alongside any Pyro haul.
Rayari Inc. Jorrit Dossier chain added to medium fighter tier — Bolide/DynaFlux/Fulgur power plant BPs.
Cargo tier info line updated to reference live Titanium price ticker for Adagio income estimates.
Bug fix: duplicate step number in heavy fighter tier step 5.
Hot Routes tab — live price ticker bar added: QUANT · NEON · E'TAM · WiDoW · STILERON · RMC · MED SUP from UEX.
Inline commodity prices injected into route cards — Quant/SCU in JP description, drug prices in drug run card, Prospector load value calculated live.
Changelog panel added — full version history from v0.1 to current.
Org Ops Planner full rebuild — session config row (objective/system/player count), crew roster with callsign + role + ship per player, 8 roles including Escort and Recon.
Live income estimates wired to UEX — Mining (Quant × 8 SCU/hr × 80% refinery), Cargo (best live margin × 46 SCU × 2 trips/hr), Salvage (RMC × 20 SCU/hr). Auto-refreshes when UEX loads.
Op Notes synergy detection — haulers with no escort in Pyro → red warning, fighter + salvage pair → green, zero combat in Pyro → red alert.
Mission Brief with per-player income estimate. 📋 Copy Brief button. ↺ Reset button. 🟢 UEX LIVE / ⚪ STATIC badge on income card.
Interdiction Planner — new panel. Jump Point Ambush, Trade Route, Hub Camp, Anti-Interdiction op types. 20 intercept locations across Stanton/Pyro/Nyx.
Crew roster with 9 roles (Mantis, Blocker, Scanner, Pursuit, Assault, Support, Boarding, Hauler, Custom). Live op assessment with synergy warnings.
Hot Routes tab — Tier 1/2/3 ranked intercept points with traffic level and tips. Comms Callouts tab — 4-phase callout structure. Op Brief with copy button.
Live price ticker bar at top of Grind Guide — QUANT · JANALITE · HADANITE · RMC · TITANIUM · MED SUP, all from UEX. 🟢 UEX LIVE timestamp.
11 income steps now show live UEX-calculated figures: Hand mining, ATLS GEO, ROC, Prospector, MOLE (total + per-player), Salvation, Vulture, Reclaimer, Adagio RAFT, Adagio C2, Covalex Master.

Curated loadouts expanded from 25 to 36: added F8C Lightning, F7A Hornet Mk II, Guardian MX, Ares Ion, Ares Inferno, Hurricane, Esperia Stinger, Redeemer, Starlancer TAC, C2 Hercules, Zeus Mk II CL, RSI Hermes.
Combat matchups expanded from 6 to 12: added F8C vs Vanguard, Shiv vs mediums, Fighting the Ares, Vanguard 2v1, Scorpius vs Super Hornet, Counter-interdiction / Mantis snare escape.

WEAPON_SLOTS expanded from 35 to 87 verified ships — full Hornet family, F8A/F8C Lightning, Guardian/Guardian MX, Ares Ion/Inferno, Esperia Stinger, Hurricane, Redeemer, Starlancer TAC, snub fighters, stealth variants.
All 5 Cloudflare Workers recreated for new account — UEX proxy, Erkul proxy, SC Craft proxy, RSI Status, AWS Status. All worker URLs updated to catmilker.workers.dev.
RSI + AWS live server status bar — sits below MOTD, updates every 2–3 minutes.
RSI side: shows Persistent Universe, Platform and Arena Commander status live from status.robertsspaceindustries.com — operational / maintenance / degraded / down with active incident names.
AWS side: monitors status.aws.amazon.com for active infrastructure incidents. Tells you if issues are CIG or their hosting (EC2/network). UTF-16 LE decode handled in worker.
Two new Cloudflare workers: catfight-rsi-status and catfight-aws-status. 5 workers total.
Combat Analysis panel — 12 meta PvP ship profiles with signature ratings, capacitor endurance, agility vs field, IR/EM from live SC Wiki. Full verified builds and org verdicts.
Weapon Matrix — S1–S5, all types (ballistic/laser/distortion/plasma), DPS/alpha/RPM/projectile speed/range from Erkul live.
Matchup Guide — Arrow vs Gladius, Ghost vs everything, lights vs heavies, Banu Defender, missile usage. 6 matchups.
Ship Comparison — pick any two ships, full side-by-side stats from SC Wiki live. Gold = better value. 18 stats. ▶ Stats expand button on every ship row.

Mining Compendium rebuilt — 6 tabs. Minerals (27 ores, live UEX prices), Ships (all vessels inc ATLS GEO), Lasers (head comparison, 4 curated loadouts), Refinery (6 methods ranked), Profit Calc (live ore prices), Crew Guide.
Full live data audit — Janalite was 4.8k baked, live is 1.6M. LB_SHIELDS/POWER/COOLERS/QD refresh live. SC Craft Tools replacing offline SC Crafter. Rep Tracker export/import fixed.
Loadout Builder — 35 verified ships in WEAPON_SLOTS, dual mount support (Arrow gimbal slot), component dropdowns refresh live after patches.
SC Craft Tools worker live — 1,534 BP sources, auto-resolves unknown drops after patches.
Mining Compendium fully rebuilt — 6 tabs replacing the old mineral table. Minerals, Ships, Lasers, Refinery, Profit Calc, Crew Guide.
Live Ship DB — SC Wiki fetch now updates ship stats (SCM, shield HP, cargo, crew, DPS) and aUEC prices automatically every session. 177 ships with live prices, 250 with live stats.
Rep Tracker export/import fixed — proper button reference, robust JSON parsing, rank index clamping on import.
Loadout Builder — 208 ships, slot groups (weapons/shield/power/cooler/QD/missiles), live Erkul weapon pickers filtered by size, real-time DPS · shield HP · regen · power · QD speed stats.
3 Cloudflare workers live — UEX (commodity prices + terminals), Erkul (weapon + ship data), SC Craft Tools (1,534 BP sources). All auto-refresh every session.

25 curated meta loadouts — Gladius, Arrow, Buccaneer, F7C Mk II, F7C-M, Sabre, Scorpius, Vanguard, Asgard, Shiv, Perseus, Connie, Hammerhead, Carrack, Vulture, Reclaimer, Prospector, MOLE, ATLS GEO. Verified 4.8 hardpoints.
BHG Stack Calc — tier/stack/cert/loot inputs, total payout + XP + breakdown bar.
Grind Guide rebuilt — Gilly S7 flagged, Adagio Titanium (3–5M+/hr), Starfarer refuel (5M+/hr), ATLS GEO, PAF farming all added.
Trade — Profit Calc + Best Locations tabs. 98 live commodities with real terminal data.
BP sources — FR-66/FR-76 corrected to 85% drop. Red Wind Linehaul confirmed for Breton/Durango/Genoa. 116 sources confirmed.
Ship DB — 14 SCU fixes, 6 new 4.8 ships, Grim Hex removed.
Full Pyro ember theme rebuild — volcanic black, lava amber, warm ivory text. No cold blues or purples.
Commodity data live-scraped from UEX — 75 items with real buy/sell/margin. All 6 new 4.8 ships added with confirmed aUEC prices.
14 SCU values corrected across SDB (Corsair, Cutter, Zeus MR/ES, Hull B, MOTH, C1 Spirit, Railen and more). Grim Hex removed from all ship purchase locations (closed post-4.4).
Meta Picks fully rebuilt with verified 4.8 hardpoints and community-confirmed verdicts across 5 tabs (Combat / Cargo / Mining / Salvage / Utility).
Calculator extended to 24 session lengths and 37 activities including all 8 Gilly's Flight School scenarios.
Systems Navigator styled with card grid layout. All tab-switching bugs fixed.
Missions panel — 606 catalogued missions, 19 factions, searchable and filterable. BP drops with rates.
Rep Tracker rebuild — 11 factions, rank unlocks, XP thresholds, BP drops.
Nav rebuild — 11 panel buttons. Grind Guide ship-tier navigator.
Component BPs — 252 items. Session estimator rebuild. Shop directory rebuild. Trade panel rebuild.
Initial build — grind guide, trade, calc, shop directory, minerals, systems, blueprints.
Contributors: CatCya, CatNipp.
